transcript: Speaker A: ಇಂಟರ್ವ್ಯೂ ಅಲ್ಲಿ "Myself Karthik" ಅಂತ ಇಂಟ್ರೋ ಕೊಡಬಹುದಾ? [Can I introduce myself as "Myself Karthik" in an interview?] Speaker B: ಬೇಡ ಕಾರ್ತಿಕ್, "Myself" ಅಂತ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡೋದು ತಪ್ಪು. "I am Karthik" ಅಥವಾ "My name is Karthik" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಆಗ್ಲೇ ಸಕ್ಕತ್ ಆಗಿ ಇರುತ್ತೆ. [No Karthik, starting with "Myself" is wrong. You should say "I am Karthik" or "My name is Karthik". That will be awesome.] Speaker A: ಹೌದಾ? ಆದ್ರೆ ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಬರಲ್ಲ. [Is it? But I don't know how to speak English.] Speaker B: ಭಯ ಪಡಬೇಡಿ. ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಡೈಲಿ 15 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಮಾತಾಡಿ. ಆಮೇಲೆ ನೋಡಿ ನೀವು ಕಡಕ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ. [Don't worry. Speak with me for 15 minutes daily. Then see, you will speak fluent English.] Speaker A: ಫೀಸ್ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಇರಬಹುದಲ್ಲವಾ? [The fees might be high, right?] Speaker B: ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಮೈಸಿವಿ ಆಪ್ ನ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಒಂದು ಕೋಟಿಗಿಂತ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಜನ ನಮ್ಮ ಜೊತೆ ಸೇರಿ ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try the MySivi app for just one rupee. More than one crore people are learning with us.] Speaker A: ಸೂಪರ್, ಈಗಲೇ ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Super, I will install it right now.]
on_screen_text: "Interview-ಲ್ಲಿ" [In interview], "Myself Karthik", "ಬೇಡ ಕಾರ್ತಿಕ್" [No Karthik], "Myself" ಅಂತ [as "Myself"], "ತಪ್ಪು" [Wrong], "I am Karthik", "is Karthik" ಅಂತ [as "is Karthik"], "ಇರುತ್ತೆ" [will be], "ಆದ್ರೆ ನನಗೆ English" [But English to me], "ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಬರಲ್ಲ" [don't know how to speak], "ಭಯಪಡಬೇಡಿ" [Don't worry], "ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ daily" [With me daily], "15 minutes ಮಾತಾಡಿ" [Speak 15 minutes], "ಕಡಕ್ English" [Fluent English], "Fees ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಇರಬಹುದಲ್ಲಪ್ಪಾ" [Fees might be high, right?], "MySivi Premium", "LIMITED TIME OFFER", "3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1", "Autopay, cancel anytime.", "1,200 learners purchased today", "24/7 AI English Teacher", "500+ Exercises and Lessons", "Unlimited Access", "MySivi app-ನ್ನ" [MySivi app], "try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು" [can try], "Start English Learning - MySivi", "10M+ Downloads", "ನಮ್ಮ ಜೊತೆ ಸೇರಿ" [Join with us], "ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ" [are learning], "MySivi English speaking app Install Now"
summary: A man on a beach asks a robot companion for interview advice, and the robot corrects his English introduction. The robot then promotes the MySivi app for daily practice, highlighting a 3-day premium trial for ₹1. The ad ends with a call to install the app.
